name: Indigo Acquisition Corp.
business: The company is a blank check company formed to effect a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. It has no current operations and has generated no revenues to date. It will not generate operating revenues until it consummates its initial business combination.

catalysts.event: Deadline to complete initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: Our amended and restated memorandum and articles of association provides that we will have only until April 2, 2027 to complete our initial business combination.
